rounds.sourceText: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.

rounds.sourceText: Chain 11 and do the same with bottom case but R3 do not FLO.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.sourceText: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.

actions.instruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
actions.note: FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
